query:
SELECT 
  'special_cases' as tbl,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es IS NOT NULL AND title_es != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value
FROM special_cases
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'documents' as tbl,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title_es IS NOT NULL AND title_es != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value
FROM documents;
